content: Next.js static export (output: 'export') unsupported features: Server Actions (forms/mutations), dynamic routes without generateStaticParams(), cookies(), rewrites/redirects/headers config, Incremental Static Regeneration, default next/image loader, intercepting routes, draft mode. Server Components are supported but only run at build time. Dynamic routes need generateStaticParams() or must use client-side data fetching with useParams(). Image optimization requires images.unoptimized:true or custom loader. Browser APIs (window, localStorage) must be guarded inside useEffect.
